subject: A large rusted and blood-encrusted bear trap with jagged serrated jaws, chained to the ground, with teal supernatural smoke wisping around it
description: A massive bear trap dominates the frame, its two serrated semicircular jaws studded with large jagged teeth and encrusted with rust and what appears to be dried blood. The central spring mechanism is visible between the jaws, decorated with circular embossed markings. A thick chain extends from the base of the trap, securing it to the rust-red ground. Around the trap, wispy teal-green supernatural smoke curls and drifts, suggesting the trap has been imbued with sinister magical energy. The ground beneath is dark reddish-brown, textured like compacted earth or dried blood. The overall atmosphere is deeply foreboding — an object that has seen violence and perhaps developed a malevolent hunger of its own, consistent with the flavor text. No figures are present; this is an object-only composition.
foreground: Rusted blood-encrusted bear trap with serrated jaws and chain
background: Dark reddish-brown ground with teal supernatural smoke wisps at the edges
